sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
💎 Crystal Used: 100% authentic Pyrite crystal.

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 ✨ Energy: Wealth, abundance, prosperity flow, and financial growth.

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 🐢 Symbolism: Tortoise represents stability, protection, patience, and steady success.

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 🧭 Placement: Best for East or North-East direction as per Vastu & Feng Shui.

 

 

 
 

 

 

• 

 
 

• 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 Designed with Care. Crafted with Soul.
